scenario.name: register_uac
scenario.send: REGISTER sip:[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sipp <sip:[service]@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[call_number] To: sipp <sip:[service]@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] REGISTER Contact: sip:[service]@[local_ip]:[local_port] Max-Forwards: 70 Expires: 3600 Subject: yunshu-register-check Content-Length: 0
